svg.script: function hghl(el) { for ( var i in el ){ var elem = document.getElementById(el[i]); if ( elem != null ) elem.setAttribute('class','highlight'); } } function uhghl(el) { for ( var i in el ){ var elem = document.getElementById(el[i]); if ( elem != null ) elem.setAttribute('class','unhighlight'); } }

g.title: Read column and table comments by hovering the columns and tables. Zoom with CTRL+whell mouse button, pan by dragging the diagram with the right-mouse button

text.tspan: Read schema comments as mouse-over tooltips

g.title: ⧉ id * integer default nextval('actions_id_seq'::regclass) ↙ permissions( action )
⧉ id * integer default nextval('booking_types_id_seq'::regclass) ↙ price_modifiers( booking_type ) ↙ rental_requests( event_type ) ↙ room_bookings( booking_type ) ↙ room_events( event_type )
🔗 Referred by price_modifiers ( booking_type -> id ) Referred by rental_requests ( event_type -> id ) Referred by room_bookings ( booking_type -> id ) Referred by room_events ( event_type -> id )
⧉ table_name * varchar(100) ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ Nombre de la tabla afectada (cinemas, rooms, seats, movies, etc.)
⧉ record_id * integer ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ ID del registro afectado en la tabla de origen
⧉ action * varchar(10) ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ Operación realizada: CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE
⧉ changed_by integer ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ ID del usuario (users.id) que ejecutó la operación. NULL si fue el sistema.
⧉ previous_data jsonb ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ Estado del registro ANTES del cambio. NULL en operaciones CREATE.
⧉ new_data jsonb ⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯⎯ Estado del registro DESPUÉS del cambio. NULL en operaciones DELETE.
